title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Kuehne+Nagel India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Kuehne+Nagel India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Kuehne+Nagel India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Kuehne+Nagel India:
Kuehne+Nagel India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kuehne+Nagel India!
